at_least_threshold_count: Count the labeled progress widgets that are {threshold_phrase}.
Using the radial progress scale, how many widgets are {threshold_phrase}?
How many displayed progress indicators meet the condition {threshold_phrase}?
From the progress arcs, count widgets whose value is {threshold_phrase}.
below_threshold_count: Count the labeled progress widgets that are {threshold_phrase}.
Using the radial progress scale, how many widgets are {threshold_phrase}?
How many displayed progress indicators meet the condition {threshold_phrase}?
From the progress arcs, count widgets whose value is {threshold_phrase}.
within_range_count: How many progress widgets have values {range_phrase}?
Count the labeled progress widgets whose values are {range_phrase}.
Using the radial progress scale, how many widgets fall {range_phrase}?
How many displayed progress indicators are {range_phrase}?
From the progress arcs, count widgets with values {range_phrase}.
highest_remaining_label: Find the progress widget with {extremum_phrase}. What is its visible label?
Using the progress arcs, which visible label corresponds to {extremum_phrase}?
Among the displayed progress widgets, which label has {extremum_phrase}?
Read the progress indicators and give the label for the widget with {extremum_phrase}.
lowest_remaining_label: Find the progress widget with {extremum_phrase}. What is its visible label?
Using the progress arcs, which visible label corresponds to {extremum_phrase}?
Among the displayed progress widgets, which label has {extremum_phrase}?
Read the progress indicators and give the label for the widget with {extremum_phrase}.

Answer format: {answer_hint}.

Required answer format: {answer_hint}.

Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.

Format for the "annotation" field: {annotation_hint}.
Format for the "answer" field: {answer_hint}.

query:at_least_threshold_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer count
query:at_least_threshold_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes, one around each counted widget

query:below_threshold_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer count
query:below_threshold_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes, one around each counted widget

query:within_range_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer count
query:within_range_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes, one around each counted widget

query:highest_remaining_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible widget label as a string
query:highest_remaining_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the answer widget

query:lowest_remaining_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible widget label as a string
query:lowest_remaining_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the answer widget
